query:
SELECT 
  a.id, a.accountName, a.domain, a.followerCount,
  COUNT(p.id) as postCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.isViral = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as viralCount,
  SUM(CASE WHEN p.isSuperViral = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as superViralCount,
  ROUND(AVG(p.likes), 0) as avgLikes,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN p.isViral = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(p.id) * 100, 2) as viralRate
FROM ip_accounts a
LEFT JOIN ip_posts p ON a.id = p.accountId
GROUP BY a.id, a.accountName, a.domain, a.followerCount
ORDER BY viralCount DESC
LIMIT 20;
